# 2024.06.01深圳场（WIP）{#shenzhen-20240601}


```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.cap='2024周深9.29Hz巡回演唱会2024.06.01深圳场歌单', out.width = "400px"}
knitr::include_graphics(rep("img/playlists/playlists-shenzhen-20240601.png"))
```



***

```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.cap='周深深圳大运中心体育场演唱会结束微博 【@weibo-charlie】'}
knitr::include_graphics(rep("img/weibo/shenzhen-20240601.png"))
```
